conflict_name: Major genocides and mass-atrocity episodes (DR priority bundle)
family_summary: Screening bundle for genocide and mass-atrocity episodes, retaining only episodes with defensible theater-specific civilian and military exposure denominators for DR estimation.
regions: Ottoman Anatolia and Syrian deportation corridors
notes: This is a family-level screening bundle rather than a single continuous conflict. Many candidate episodes have strong victim counts but weak military exposure denominators; only publishable episodes are fully estimated.
